allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 4764 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count')
